content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886
January 26, 2006

Mary Jo Del Campo
President
San Miguel Joint Union School District
8765 Pronghorn Court
Bradley, CA 93426

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-008

Dear Ms. Del Campo:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice of January 17, 2006. Your inquiry primarily presents issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act"). Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice must be declined by this agency.

Should you need assistance in the future, you may contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JWW:rd

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California code of Regulations.
